intended_use: Lunit INSIGHT CXR Triage is a radiological computer-assisted triage and notification software that analyzes adult chest X-ray images for the presence of pre-specified suspected critical findings (pleu
intended_use_full: Lunit INSIGHT CXR Triage is a radiological computer-assisted triage and notification software that analyzes adult chest X-ray images for the presence of pre-specified suspected critical findings (pleural effusion and/or pneumothorax). Lunit INSIGHT CXR Triage uses an artificial intelligence algorithm to analyze images for features suggestive of critical findings and provides case-level output available in the PACS/workstation for worklist prioritization or triage. As a passive notification for prioritization-only software tool within standard of care workflow, Lunit INSIGHT CXR Triage does not send a proactive alert directly to the appropriately trained medical specialists. Lunit INSIGHT CXR Triage is not intended to direct attention to specific portions of an image. Its results are not intended to be used on a stand-alone basis for clinical decision-making.
target_condition: Pleural effusion and/or pneumotharax on chest X-ray
ground_truth: Images classified into positive and negative groups by highly experienced board-certified radiologists
other_metrics: Device performance time: 20.76 seconds (95% CI: 20.23-21.28) for pleural effusion; 20.45 seconds (95% CI: 19.99-20.92) for pneumothorax. Internal nonclinical validation on 1,385 images showed ROC AUC 0.9864 (95% CI: 0.9815-0.9913) with 94.29% sensitivity and 95.72% specificity for pleural effusion; ROC AUC 0.9973 (95% CI: 0.9955-0.9992) with 96.08% sensitivity and 99.14% specificity for pneumothorax.
